techstart.title: Blitz Arena — Live Auction & Tournaments
techstart.description: Full-stack platform for World of Tanks Blitz communities: live auction drafts, community events with sign-ups, and tournaments — FIFA-style leagues and registration cups with seeded groups and an auto-advancing knockout bracket. Admins run everything; members register and bid; streamers broadcast live.
techstart.challenge: Build a fair, concurrency-safe live auction with a server-authoritative timer (so it never depends on the admin's browser tab), plus two tournament engines — group standings and an auto-advancing single-elimination bracket — all behind row-level-secured Postgres so the server stays the single source of truth.

nordshop.title: NordShop
nordshop.description: High-converting online store for a Nordic market — custom Stripe integration, advanced product filtering, multi-currency, and a mobile-first checkout that lifted conversions by 40%.

buildflow.title: BuildFlow Dashboard
buildflow.description: Project management dashboard with real-time updates, team workspaces, Gantt charts, and advanced analytics — built for a German B2B SaaS startup.

medconnect.title: MedConnect API
medconnect.description: HIPAA-compliant REST API for a healthcare provider — patient records, appointment scheduling, real-time notifications, and secure third-party integrations.

greenmarket.title: GreenMarket
greenmarket.description: B2C + B2B sustainable goods marketplace with Sanity CMS, custom product configurator, wholesale pricing tiers, and a 98 Lighthouse score.

foodie.title: Foodie Brașov
foodie.description: Website for a shawarma restaurant in the Old Town of Brașov — animated hero, live Google Reviews counter, bilingual RO/EN, full SEO with schema.org structured data and flash-free dark mode.

shawarmania.title: Shawarmania by Tata Radu
shawarmania.description: Landing page for the only lamb-shawarma spot in Brașov — parallax animated hero, bilingual RO/EN, category menu with prices, swipe testimonials carousel and a live "open now" indicator. Full SEO with schema.org structured data and flash-free light/dark mode.
